text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. I know there are chilled delivery
services that keep stuff cold, but are there
delivery services that keep things hot too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono steps into my office and
immediately throws me for a loop with her bizarre
question.
choice_data_list: I don't think those exist... Why do you ask?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... So actually, I got this letter in the mail...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And it said, "I love watching you race, Miss Bono!
You're big and powerful like a truck!" ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Reading that made me so happy! I was going to
write back, but the sender's mom added a note
saying not to worry about replying, since I'm
probably so busy.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
So instead of a letter, I thought I could send them
a pot of Nankai chanko! ♪
choice_data_list: I don't think that's a good idea...
I don't think that's a good idea...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oh, really? Well, I guess I can't anyway if there
aren't any heated delivery services around.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Wait, I know! I can just use a chilled delivery
service to send them a tub of homemade ice
cream!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'd better start making it now! ♪ I'm just going to
head out to the neighborhood supermarket real
qui—
choice_data_list: Wait, just send them a normal letter!
Wait, just send them a normal letter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hastily stop Hishi Akebono before she runs off.
She might have a big appetite, but it looks like
that fan letter has filled her right up with
happiness.
